pi_items.source: Verified against https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openskies-sh/aerobridge/master/fixtures/initial_data.json - operator record exists with company.full_name='Electric Inspection'
Verified against Aerobridge fixture initial_data.json - Electric Inspection operator has this exact UUID

Verified against fixture: both activities exist in initial_data.json (photographing: 7a875ff9-79ee-460e-816f-30360e0ac645, videotaping: 26b6a66d-5e77-4a43-94e9-630e141a1087). Task requires adding videotaping to existing photographing.

Verified against fixture: both authorizations exist in initial_data.json (SORA V2: 6be25abc-a43d-44d2-9c16-b8dee47bb64d, SORA: e7bfa98c-8e4f-40bd-b42f-62fd3651d7da). Task requires adding SORA to existing SORA V2.
Verified via verifier.py mapping: operator_type 2 = 'Non-LUC'. Initial fixture has operator_type 0 (NA), task requires changing to 2 (Non-LUC).
Verified across multiple scripts: install_aerobridge.sh (line 161), setup_aerobridge.sh (line 160), setup_task.sh (line 119), and task description
Verified in install_aerobridge.sh (line 153) - superuser created with username 'admin'. Also confirmed in setup_aerobridge.sh (line 161) and README.md
Verified in install_aerobridge.sh (line 150) - DJANGO_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD set to 'adminpass123'. Confirmed in setup_aerobridge.sh (line 161) and README.md

privileged_info_summary: The Electric Inspection drone operator (ID: 566d63bb-cb1c-42dc-9a51-baef0d0a8d04) is a real operator in Aerobridge's standard fixture data. Currently has operator_type 0 (NA), authorized_activities [photographing], and operational_authorizations [SORA V2]. The task requires three specific updates: (1) add videotaping activity (ID: 26b6a66d-5e77-4a43-94e9-630e141a1087), (2) add SORA authorization (ID: e7bfa98c-8e4f-40bd-b42f-62fd3651d7da), and (3) change operator_type to 2 (Non-LUC). Admin credentials are admin/adminpass123 at http://localhost:8000/admin/.
